overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a soldier character walking through a sunlit South American town with colorful stucco buildings, market stalls, and tropical vegetation. The character navigates from narrow streets through an open market area and past a municipal building labeled 'ALCALDIA' before continuing along the roadside.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow urban street with colorful residential buildings

events.description: character turns left at the street corner with the hotel mural
moving from enclosed street to more open area approaching the market

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street with weapon shouldered, scanning the surroundings

entered.detail: tall cinder block wall running along the right side of the street
two-story building with pink lower facade and white upper floors with balconies
cluster of white buildings visible in the valley background
single-story yellow building with red roof tiles
large painted wall mural reading 'HOTEL COMA' in colorful letters

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow sunlit street bordered by a concrete wall on the right and colorful stucco buildings. After turning left at a corner marked by a large hotel mural, the scene opens slightly to reveal a yellow building and distant market stalls ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market square with vendor stalls and colorful decorations

events.description: entering the open market area with vendor stalls and canopy tents
passing under strings of colorful triangular pennant banners overhead

agents.ego_description: moving through the market plaza, passing by stalls selling goods

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a market stall with blue tarp covering
person standing near market stalls in the distance

entered.detail: wooden stall with canvas canopy and baskets of produce
strings of red, green, and yellow triangular flags crossing overhead
large white three-story building with multiple windows

segments.scene_description: The character enters a sunlit market square filled with vendor stalls and colorful pennant banners strung overhead. NPC vendors stand behind their stalls as the character moves through the open area toward a large white building in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: town center with municipal building and road crossing

events.description: approaching the large green municipal building labeled ALCALDIA
white van drives past on the street from left to right
character crosses the street toward the building entrance

agents.ego_description: approaching the ALCALDIA building and crossing the street to reach the entrance

notable_agents.action: white van driving along the road past the intersection

entered.detail: three-story green and white municipal building with balcony and 'ALCALDIA' signage
green directional signpost with white text indicating 'ALTA GRACIA' and 'LA MARQUEZA'

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the prominent green ALCALDIA building at the town center. After a white van passes by on the street, the character crosses the road toward the building entrance, passing a green directional road sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage alongside municipal building with dense tropical vegetation

events.description: moving from paved street to dirt path alongside the building with dense vegetation
emerging from side path back onto sidewalk and street

agents.ego_description: moving along the side of the building through vegetation, then continuing down the street

entered.detail: large tropical banana leaves and dense shrubs alongside the path
three-story green residential building with red scaffolding on the side
tall palm trees lining the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a narrow dirt path beside the ALCALDIA building, passing dense tropical vegetation including banana plants. After rounding the building, the character emerges back onto the sidewalk and continues down the street lined with palm trees and green apartment buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow residential street through a bustling town center and back into a lush roadside corridor. It begins along a sunlit path bordered by concrete walls and colorful stucco buildings, turning at a large hotel mural to reveal a yellow building and distant market stalls. As the character enters the open market square, the view expands to show vendor stalls and colorful pennant banners strung overhead before shifting toward a prominent white building in the distance. The scene then progresses toward the green ALCALDIA building at the town center, crossing the road past a white van and a directional sign. Finally, the camera follows the character along a narrow dirt path through dense tropical vegetation and banana plants before emerging back onto a sidewalk lined with palm trees and green apartment buildings.
